problem.title: Customer messages, tasks, and bills scattered everywhere?

items.title: Chat here, tasks there
items.desc: Hours spent searching across KakaoTalk, email, and SMS for that one request.

items.title: Who's covering this week's deadline?
items.desc: Promised work spread across notes, calendars, and memory — things keep slipping through.

items.title: I'll send the invoice next week
items.desc: Postponed billing and tax invoices delay payment too.

solution.title: PlanQ unifies it
solution.desc: Conversations, tasks, documents, files, and invoices in one workspace. Each customer's scattered context bundled together, with AI suggesting the next move.

talk.name: Customer chat
talk.desc: 1:1 chat per customer with shared files. Extract tasks straight from messages.

task.name: Task execution
task.desc: Assign, review, complete in one flow. AI organizes by deliverables.

note.name: Voice memo
note.desc: Record meetings, calls, interviews → auto summary + suggested replies.

file.name: Files
file.desc: Organized by project and customer. Google Drive sync, automatic dedup.

bill.name: Billing
bill.desc: Quotes, contracts, invoices, tax invoices in one sequence. Auto-progressing.

usecases.title: Any team that talks to customers directly

solo.title: Solopreneurs · Freelancers
solo.desc: Stop dropping things when handling everything alone. Per-customer chat, tasks, and billing in one screen.

studio.title: Design · Content studios
studio.desc: Track materials, feedback, and timelines per project. AI suggests the next step.

consulting.title: Consulting · Professional services
consulting.desc: Auto-organize meetings, notes, and tasks. Never miss invoicing or tax invoices again.

basic.name: Basic
features: Q Note · Q File · Q Bill full

data.q: Can I import my existing KakaoTalk or email data?
data.a: Customer info and contacts can be imported via CSV. Chat history starts fresh inside PlanQ — upload prior materials to Q File to keep them searchable and linked.

cancel.a: Yes. After cancellation your data is preserved for 30 days so you can resume. Try 14 days free with no credit card before deciding.

team.q: How many teammates can I invite?
team.a: Free is for 1 person, Basic up to 5, Pro unlimited. You can add more seats as Addons if needed.

ios.a: Yes. Add to home screen as a PWA for fast access and push notifications. Works on iOS Safari and Android Chrome.

security.a: Hosted in Korea, HTTPS everywhere, with strict multi-tenant isolation. Every change is in the audit log, and each business's data is fully separated.

finalCta.title: An organized workspace, starting today
finalCta.sub: 14 days free. No credit card needed.

footer.tagline: Requests as a Queue, execution by Cue.
